title: Simpleflips counts stars in GBJ (or does he????) [YTPMV Collab Entry]
description:
My part for Arados' Counting Stars Collab. Usually I hate doing lyrical/sentance mixing stuff but this was a lot of fun, it's nice to leave your comfort zone sometimes.

Watch the full collab HERE: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CYm5FRE9N7g NNNNOOOOWWWW 🫵🫵🫵🫵🫵🫵🫵🫵🫵🫵🫵
